---
# =====================================================================
#  Policy brief — one-pager (LaTeX/PDF via Quarto)
#  Render:  quarto render coal-worker-transitions.qmd
#  Design system: _style.tex (colours, fonts, boxes, macros)
# =====================================================================
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=0.32in
      - bottom=0.32in
      - left=0.583in
      - right=0.583in
    include-in-header: ../../../formats/briefs/_style.tex
    keep-tex: true
---

```{=latex}
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% MASTHEAD
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\briefheader{%
  \includegraphics[height=0.45in]{../../../formats/logos/eil-logo-maroon.png}%
}{Policy Brief}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% TITLE + CITATION
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\brieftitle{Transitional Costs and the Decline of Coal: Worker-Level Evidence}
\briefcitation{Colmer, Krause, Lyubich \& Voorheis \textperiodcentered{} Working Paper, 2025}

\vspace{3pt}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% BOTTOM LINE
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{bottomline}
\textbf{[Bottom line goes here.]}
\end{bottomline}

\vspace{2pt}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% BACKGROUND
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\sectionhead{Background}
\noindent [Background text goes here.]

\vspace{4pt}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% TWO COLUMNS
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.483\linewidth}
\subhead{[Left column head]}
{\colsize [Left column text.]\par}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.483\linewidth}
\subhead{[Right column head]}
{\colsize [Right column text.]\par}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{12pt}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% PULL QUOTE | FIGURE
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.40\linewidth}
\vspace{0pt}
\begin{pullquote}
[Pull quote text goes here.]
\end{pullquote}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.575\linewidth}
\vspace{0pt}
\figtitle{Fig.\ 1 \textperiodcentered{} [Figure title]}{Source: Colmer et al.\ (2025).}
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth]{../figures/fig1.png}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0pt}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% IMPLICATIONS
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\sectionhead{Implications}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.310\linewidth}
\colhead{[Implication 1]}
{\impcolsize [Text.]\par}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.310\linewidth}
\colhead{[Implication 2]}
{\impcolsize [Text.]\par}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.310\linewidth}
\colhead{[Implication 3]}
{\impcolsize [Text.]\par}
\end{minipage}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
% FOOTER
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
\brieffooter{[Method note and link to full paper.]}
```
